stale_threshold_hours.description: Hours before an in_progress task is considered stale (default: 24).
Hours before an in_progress task is considered stale (default: 24).

key_name.description: Env-var style key name of the credential to delete (e.g. 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY').

api_key.description: The raw API key value to store encrypted.

provider_id.description: Provider ID this key belongs to (e.g. 'anthropic', 'openai').

text.description: Full-text search on title and description.

project.description: Project path (accepted for API compatibility, currently unused).
Optional project path for project-scoped execution pause.

reason.description: Optional reason used when mode is "immediate".

project.description: Optional project path for project-scoped execution resume.
Optional project path for project-scoped execution start.
Optional project path for project-scoped execution status.

project_issues.description: Per-project health issues blocking execution (project_id → error message).

BrokenLink.description: A wikilink pointing to a note that does not exist.

url.description:
Memory URI: "memory://folder/note", "folder/note", or "folder/*" for all
notes in a folder.

NoteCompact.description: Compact note summary (no full content) for list and recent queries.

sha.description: Specific commit SHA. Omit to get the diff for the most recent change.

find_text.description: Required for find_replace: exact text to search for.

section.description: Required for replace_section: heading text identifying the section.

type.description:
If provided and different from current type, move the note to the new
type's folder. Allowed values same as memory_write type.

GraphEdge.description: A resolved wikilink edge between two notes.

GraphNode.description: A knowledge graph node (note with connection metadata).

connection_count.description: Total resolved edges incident to this node (inbound + outbound).

project.description: Absolute path to the project directory.

GitLogEntry.description: A single git commit entry for note history.

depth.description: Depth control: 0 = unlimited, 1 = exact folder (default), N = N levels.

NoteCompact.description: Compact note summary (no full content) for list and recent queries.

title.description: Optional new title; keep current title if omitted.

type.description: New note type to move the note to.

OrphanNote.description: A note with zero inbound wikilinks (potential dead-end).

NoteCompact.description: Compact note summary (no full content) for list and recent queries.

project.description: Absolute path to the project directory.

type.description:
Note type: adr, pattern, research, requirement, reference, design,
session, persona, journey, design_spec, competitive, tech_spike,
brief (singleton), roadmap (singleton).

action.description:
Action to perform: status (view all, default), reset (reset one model),
reset_all (reset all models), enable (re-enable auto-disabled model).

model.description: Model ID (required for reset and enable actions).

path.description: Absolute path to the project directory.

ProjectCommandSpec.description: A single command entry in a project's setup or verification list.
A single command entry in a project's setup or verification list.

setup_commands.description: Full replacement for setup commands. Omit to keep existing.

verification_commands.description: Full replacement for verification commands. Omit to keep existing.

validation_errors.description: Commands that failed validation (non-zero exit). Empty on success.

base_url.description: Root URL for OpenAI-compatible API calls (e.g. https://api.my-llm.com/v1).

env_var.description: Environment variable name for the API key (e.g. MY_LLM_API_KEY).

id.description: Unique provider slug (e.g. 'my-llm'). Must not collide with models.dev IDs.

seed_models.description: Optional seed models to pre-populate the model picker.

provider_id.description: Provider ID to fetch models for (e.g. 'anthropic', 'openai').
Provider ID to start OAuth for (accepts catalog/goose aliases, e.g. 'github-copilot').

base_url.description:
Provider API base URL (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1). The probe appends /models.
When omitted, the server resolves it from the catalog using provider_id.

provider_id.description: Provider identifier. Used for logging and to resolve base_url from the catalog when not supplied.

key.description: Optional settings key to fetch (defaults to settings.raw).

DjinnSettings.description: Typed settings schema. Unknown fields are rejected at parse time.

dispatch_limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to dispatch per cycle (default 50).
Maximum number of tasks to dispatch per cycle. Omit to keep current value.

max_sessions.description: Per-model concurrent session caps (e.g. {"chatgpt_codex/gpt-5.3-codex": 4}). Omit to keep current value.

model_priority_conflict_resolver.description: Ordered model list for the 'conflict_resolver' role. Omit to keep current value.

model_priority_task_reviewer.description: Ordered model list for the 'task_reviewer' role. Omit to keep current value.

model_priority_worker.description: Ordered model list for the 'worker' role (e.g. ["chatgpt_codex/gpt-5.3-codex"]). Omit to keep current value.

id.description: Task UUID or short_id (optional — omit to query all tasks).

project.description: Absolute project path. Optional — task IDs are globally unique.

session_id.description: Session ID of the claiming agent (recorded as actor_id in the activity log).

blocked_by.description: Task IDs (UUID or short_id) that block this task. Blockers are set atomically at creation.

epic_id.description: Parent epic ID — UUID or short_id (required).

memory_refs.description: Memory note permalinks to attach to this task at creation.

text.description: Full-text search on title and description.

priority_max.description: Maximum priority to include (0=highest, higher numbers=lower priority).

project.description: Absolute project path. Optional — task IDs are globally unique.
Absolute path to the project git repository.

team_wide.description:
If true, delete the remote `djinn/tasks` branch (team-wide disable).
If false or absent, only clear the local enabled flag (machine opt-out).

project.description: Absolute path to the project git repository.
Project path (accepted for API compatibility, currently unused).
Project path (accepted for API compatibility, currently unused).
Project path (accepted for API compatibility, currently unused).

action.description:
Transition action: accept, start, submit_verification,
verification_pass, verification_fail, release_verification,
submit_task_review, task_review_start,
task_review_reject, task_review_reject_conflict, task_review_approve,
reopen, close, release, release_task_review, force_close,
user_override.

reason.description:
Required for: verification_fail, release_verification,
task_review_reject, task_review_reject_conflict,
reopen, release, release_task_review, force_close.

target_status.description:
Required when action = "user_override". Allowed values: draft, open, verifying,
needs_task_review, in_task_review, in_progress, closed.

blocked_by_add.description: Task IDs (UUID or short_id) to add as blockers of this task.

blocked_by_remove.description: Task IDs (UUID or short_id) to remove as blockers of this task.

epic_id.description: New parent epic UUID or short_id.

memory_refs_add.description: Memory note permalinks to add to this task.

memory_refs_remove.description: Memory note permalinks to remove from this task.
